name: Custom Security Questionnaire
description: Customisable base template — add, remove, or modify questions to match your vendor assessment requirements

questions.text: Does your organisation hold a current ISO 27001 certification or SOC 2 Type II attestation?
questions.follow_up: Please provide the certification date, scope, and certifying body. Attach the certificate or executive summary.

questions.text: Is multi-factor authentication enforced for all access to systems that store or process our data?
questions.follow_up: Describe compensating controls in place and your remediation timeline.

questions.text: How frequently do you conduct external penetration tests of systems in scope for services provided to us?
options: Only on major releases or significant changes

questions.text: Do you have a vulnerability management programme with defined SLAs for remediating critical and high-severity findings?
questions.follow_up: What are your SLAs for critical and high-severity vulnerabilities?

questions.text: Please rate the overall maturity of your information security programme on a scale of 1 to 5 (1 = ad hoc, 5 = optimised/continuously improving).
What is your contractually committed uptime SLA for the services you provide to us?
Do you have documented recovery time objectives (RTOs) and recovery point objectives (RPOs) for your service?
questions.follow_up: State your RTO and RPO for the service tier applicable to our engagement.

questions.text: Is your disaster recovery plan tested at least annually?
questions.follow_up: Describe the most recent test type and outcome.

questions.text: Do you publish a public status page or provide a mechanism for customers to receive real-time service availability notifications?
questions.follow_up: Provide the URL and describe the notification mechanism.

questions.text: When was your last material service outage that affected customer data or service availability?
Is all customer data encrypted at rest using AES-256 or equivalent, and in transit using TLS 1.2 or higher?
questions.follow_up: Identify which data stores or transit paths are not encrypted and provide your remediation plan.

questions.text: Can you confirm that our data is logically or physically segregated from other customers' data?
questions.follow_up: Describe the isolation mechanism (e.g. dedicated database schema, dedicated storage account, separate environment).

questions.text: Do you use sub-processors or third parties who may access or process data you hold on our behalf?
questions.follow_up: Please provide a list of sub-processors, the data they access, and where they are located.

questions.text: Can you securely and verifiably delete our data within 30 days of contract termination upon our request?
questions.follow_up: Describe the deletion process and whether a certificate of deletion is provided.

questions.text: In which countries or regions is our data stored and/or processed?
Which of the following compliance certifications or attestations does your organisation currently hold?
Have you been subject to any regulatory enforcement actions, data breach notifications to regulators, or material security-related litigation in the past 3 years?
questions.follow_up: Describe the nature of the matter, the regulator or court involved, and the resolution.

questions.text: Are you willing to sign our standard Data Processing Agreement (DPA) incorporating GDPR Standard Contractual Clauses where applicable?
Do you have cyber liability insurance with a minimum coverage limit that meets our vendor requirements?
questions.follow_up: State the coverage limit, policy period, and provide a certificate of insurance.

questions.text: Are you willing to allow us (or a mutually agreed third party) to conduct a security assessment or audit of your environment with reasonable notice?
questions.follow_up: Please describe any alternative assurance mechanisms you can offer in lieu of a direct audit.
